action.reasoning: Observation: 20-epoch training completed with zero_mask saved for features 60-79. Best val_r2=0.5764 but eval mean_r2 was -3.6B last time without zero_mask. Analysis: Zero_mask should give R²≈0 for bad features instead of -1000, dramatically improving mean_r2. Decision: Submit eval to validate the fix before further training improvements.
